summary: Tested price updates ($499/$699), navbar Tools link, and ToolsIndexPage with 4 tool cards. Found and fixed a critical bug in ToolsIndexPage.jsx causing blank app render.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: ToolsIndexPage.jsx - GOLD constant was used in PORTAL_TOOLS array (line 31) before being declared (line 64), causing a runtime ReferenceError and blank page render. Fixed by moving GOLD/NAVY declarations before PORTAL_TOOLS.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price update ($399->$499, $599->$699) verified on ComplianceLibraryPage. Backend LP-BDL-001 (49900 cents) and LP-LIB-001 (69900 cents) checkout endpoints working. Navbar Tools link present. ToolsIndexPage shows all 4 tools with correct CTAs. GOLD const ordering bug was fixed.
rca_of_issue: ToolsIndexPage.jsx defined PORTAL_TOOLS array at module scope on line 6, referencing `GOLD` constant that was declared at module scope on line 64. JavaScript const declarations are in the temporal dead zone until evaluated - accessing before declaration throws ReferenceError, causing the React bundle to fail on load and render a blank page. Fix: moved GOLD and NAVY const declarations to lines 6-7 (before PORTAL_TOOLS).
